Hero.subtitle: We design solar solutions tailored to your consumption, building and long-term energy goals.

Engineering.title: We treat every project as an engineering task, not equipment sales.
Engineering.text: Our approach starts with an analysis of consumption, technical conditions, connection capacity and the investor’s long-term goals. The goal is not to offer a generic package, but to design a solar solution that is technically justified, economically sound and reliable in the long term.

Contact.title: Let’s start analyzing your project.
Contact.subtitle: Send us basic information about your building and consumption, and we will propose an optimal solar solution.
Contact.name: Full name
Contact.message: Briefly describe your building or project
Contact.successText: We have received your message and will get back to you within 24 hours.

About.title: Experience, technology and modern energy solutions.
About.paragraph1: Ekogrid was created from long-standing experience in the power sector and the belief that solar systems deserve much more than an approach based only on the lowest price.
About.paragraph2: Our goal is not only the installation of solar panels, but finding the optimal solution for each building through an analysis of consumption, connection capacity, technical possibilities and the investor’s long-term goals.
About.paragraph3: We believe that a successful project begins with quality planning. That is why we provide clients with professional support from the initial assessment and technical analysis to the organization of project implementation. We focus on reliable equipment, technical correctness of the system and a realistic assessment of investment feasibility.
About.paragraph4: Our approach is based on expertise in the energy sector and renewable energy sources, along with continuous improvement and monitoring of modern technologies. Through international professional development programs in solar energy and the integration of renewable sources into the power system, we have gained knowledge that we apply in the development of high-quality and long-term sustainable energy solutions.
About.highlight1: Years of experience in the power sector

Solutions.title: Solar solutions for homes, businesses and utility-scale projects.
Solutions.subtitle: We design and develop solar energy systems tailored to a wide range of needs, from residential installations to large-scale solar projects.
Solutions.residentialText: Solar systems for houses and apartments, tailored to consumption, roof characteristics and household connection capacity.
Solutions.businessText: Solutions for business facilities that reduce electricity costs and increase energy security.
Solutions.investorsText: Support in the development of larger solar projects, from initial assessment and technical analysis to implementation organization.

Process.title: From the first assessment to long-term system operation.
Process.subtitle: We guide each solar project through a clear process that connects technical analysis, economic assessment, implementation and post-installation support.
Process.step1Text: Analysis of the building, consumption, roof, location and basic technical conditions.
Process.step2Text: System sizing, production estimate and techno-economic analysis.
Process.step3Text: Organization of equipment, installation works and commissioning of the solar system.
Process.step4Text: System performance monitoring, optimization advice and technical support for users.

Consultation.title2: We will prepare a technical and economic assessment.
Consultation.subtitle: Based on information about your property, electricity consumption and technical conditions, we prepare a preliminary production estimate, investment feasibility assessment and recommendation of the optimal solar solution.

Footer.description: Engineering approach to solar solutions for households, businesses and utility-scale projects.

ConsultationPage.title1: Let’s find the optimal solar solution.
ConsultationPage.title2: We will prepare a technical and economic assessment.
ConsultationPage.subtitle: Select the project type and provide basic information so we can prepare a preliminary analysis and solution proposal.

ConsultationPage.plannedPower: Planned power plant capacity (kW or MW)

residential.title: Solar solutions for your home.
residential.subtitle: A solar power system tailored to your household, using the net metering model and the status of a prosumer.
residential.benefit1: Reduce your electricity bill by using the net metering model.
residential.benefit2: Produce and consume your own electricity, while delivering surplus energy to the distribution grid.
residential.benefit3: Less dependence on rising electricity prices and greater control over consumption.
residential.additionalTitle: Expand the capabilities of your home solar system.
residential.batteryText: Design of battery systems for backup power, increased energy autonomy and use in off-grid buildings.
residential.evText: Charging an electric vehicle at home with the possibility of integration with the solar system and better control of consumption.

business.title: Solar solutions for business facilities.
business.subtitle: Reduce electricity costs and increase energy security through a solar system tailored to your company’s consumption.
business.benefit1: Lower operating costs and better predictability of electricity expenses.
business.benefit2: Reliable on-site energy production and reduced exposure to price changes.
business.benefit3: Long-term improvement of competitiveness and a sustainable business image.
business.batteryText: Battery systems for better consumption management, peak load reduction and increased power supply security for business facilities.
business.evText: Solutions for charging electric vehicles at business locations, parking areas and company fleets.

investors.title: Support for the development and implementation of large-scale solar projects.
investors.subtitle: From site potential assessment and techno-economic analysis to project development coordination and implementation.
investors.benefit1: Evaluation of solar potential, grid connection possibilities and key technical constraints.
investors.benefit2: Assessment of energy production, investment costs, revenues and expected project profitability.
investors.benefit3: Support through key project development stages, from initial concept to implementation preparation.
investors.additionalTitle: Support for investors from idea to implementation.
investors.networkText: Analysis of connection possibilities, assessment of required infrastructure and identification of potential grid limitations.
investors.marketText: Support in navigating permitting requirements, administrative procedures and critical project development milestones.
